---
title: "debiasR: Simulated Methods Walkthrough"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Purpose

This walkthrough runs and visualizes the implemented `debiasR` correction methods using simulated package datasets.

## Setup

```{r}
pkg_root <- if (file.exists("DESCRIPTION")) "." else ".."

if (!requireNamespace("debiasR", quietly = TRUE)) {
  if (!requireNamespace("devtools", quietly = TRUE)) {
    stop("Install either `debiasR` or `devtools` to load the local package.")
  }
  devtools::load_all(pkg_root, quiet = TRUE)
}

library(debiasR)
library(tidyverse)
source(file.path(pkg_root, "style", "data-visualisation_theme.R"))
```

```{r}
data("simulated_mpd.od", package = "debiasR")
data("simulated_benchmark.od", package = "debiasR")
data("simulated_coverage", package = "debiasR")
data("simulated_covariates", package = "debiasR")
data("simulated_active.users", package = "debiasR")
data("simulated_pop", package = "debiasR")

tibble(
  dataset = c(
    "simulated_mpd.od",
    "simulated_benchmark.od",
    "simulated_coverage",
    "simulated_covariates",
    "simulated_active.users",
    "simulated_pop"
  ),
  rows = c(
    nrow(simulated_mpd.od),
    nrow(simulated_benchmark.od),
    nrow(simulated_coverage),
    nrow(simulated_covariates),
    nrow(simulated_active.users),
    nrow(simulated_pop)
  )
)
```

## Plot Helpers

```{r}
plot_origin_totals <- function(df, flow_col = "flow", title_text) {
  df |>
    group_by(origin) |>
    summarise(total_flow = sum(.data[[flow_col]], na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
    ggplot(aes(x = reorder(origin, total_flow), y = total_flow)) +
    geom_col(fill = "#121282", alpha = 0.9) +
    coord_flip() +
    labs(
      title = title_text,
      x = "Origin",
      y = "Total flow"
    ) +
    theme_plot_tufte()
}

plot_adj_vs_benchmark <- function(adj_df, benchmark_df, title_text) {
  cmp <- adj_df |>
    select(origin, destination, flow_adj) |>
    inner_join(
      benchmark_df |>
        select(origin, destination, flow_bench = flow),
      by = c("origin", "destination")
    )

  ggplot(cmp, aes(x = flow_bench, y = flow_adj)) +
    geom_point(color = "#121282", alpha = 0.75, size = 2) +
    geom_abline(intercept = 0, slope = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "#FE7105") +
    labs(
      title = title_text,
      x = "Benchmark flow",
      y = "Adjusted flow"
    ) +
    theme_plot_tufte()
}

collect_metrics <- function(method_name, adj_df) {
  v <- validate_flows(
    adj_df = adj_df,
    benchmark_od_df = simulated_benchmark.od,
    method_name = method_name,
    return_joined = FALSE
  )

  tibble(
    method = v$method,
    n = v$n,
    pearson_r = v$pearson_r,
    spearman_rho = v$spearman_rho,
    rmse = v$rmse,
    mae = v$mae,
    mape = v$mape,
    r_squared = v$r_squared
  )
}
```

## Baseline Visuals

```{r}
plot_origin_totals(simulated_mpd.od, "flow", "Observed MPD Flows by Origin")
```

```{r}
plot_origin_totals(simulated_benchmark.od, "flow", "Benchmark Flows by Origin")
```

## 1) `adjust_inverse_penetration`

```{r}
adj_m1 <- adjust_inverse_penetration(
  mpd_od_df = simulated_mpd.od,
  coverage_df = simulated_coverage,
  weight_by = "both"
)

collect_metrics("adjust_inverse_penetration", adj_m1)
```

```{r}
plot_adj_vs_benchmark(adj_m1, simulated_benchmark.od, "Method 1: Adjusted vs Benchmark")
```

## 2) `adjust_selection_rate`

```{r}
adj_m2 <- adjust_selection_rate(
  mpd_od_df = simulated_mpd.od,
  coverage_df = simulated_coverage,
  covariates_df = simulated_covariates,
  income_col = "income_norm",
  weight_by = "origin",
  benchmark_od_df = simulated_benchmark.od,
  calibration_aggregate = "origin"
)

list(r_global = attr(adj_m2, "r_global"))
```

```{r}
plot_adj_vs_benchmark(adj_m2, simulated_benchmark.od, "Method 2: Adjusted vs Benchmark")
```

## 3) `adjust_selection_rate2`

```{r}
adj_m3 <- adjust_selection_rate2(
  mpd_od_df = simulated_mpd.od,
  coverage_df = simulated_coverage,
  weight_by = "origin",
  benchmark_od_df = simulated_benchmark.od,
  calibration_aggregate = "origin"
)

list(k = attr(adj_m3, "k"))
```

```{r}
plot_adj_vs_benchmark(adj_m3, simulated_benchmark.od, "Method 3: Adjusted vs Benchmark")
```

## 4) `adjust_raking_ratio`

```{r}
adj_m4 <- adjust_raking_ratio(
  mpd_od_df = simulated_mpd.od,
  benchmark_od_df = simulated_benchmark.od
)

list(
  ipf_converged = attr(adj_m4, "ipf_converged"),
  ipf_iterations = attr(adj_m4, "ipf_iterations")
)
```

```{r}
plot_adj_vs_benchmark(adj_m4, simulated_benchmark.od, "Method 4: Adjusted vs Benchmark")
```

## 5) `adjust_coefficient`

```{r}
adj_m5 <- adjust_coefficient(
  mpd_od_df = simulated_mpd.od,
  benchmark_od_df = simulated_benchmark.od,
  model_family = "ols",
  level = "od"
)

list(coef = attr(adj_m5, "coef"))
```

```{r}
plot_adj_vs_benchmark(adj_m5, simulated_benchmark.od, "Method 5: Adjusted vs Benchmark")
```

## Compare Validation Metrics Across Methods

```{r}
metrics_tbl <- bind_rows(
  collect_metrics("adjust_inverse_penetration", adj_m1),
  collect_metrics("adjust_selection_rate", adj_m2),
  collect_metrics("adjust_selection_rate2", adj_m3),
  collect_metrics("adjust_raking_ratio", adj_m4),
  collect_metrics("adjust_coefficient", adj_m5)
) |>
  arrange(desc(pearson_r))

metrics_tbl
```

```{r}
metrics_tbl |>
  mutate(method = fct_reorder(method, pearson_r)) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = method, y = pearson_r)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#41AE76", alpha = 0.9) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Pearson Correlation by Method",
    x = "Method",
    y = "Pearson r"
  ) +
  theme_plot_tufte()
```

## `measure_bias` Example

```{r}
coverage_for_bias <- simulated_pop |>
  inner_join(
    simulated_active.users |>
      select(origin, user_count),
    by = "origin"
  )

bias_df <- measure_bias(coverage_for_bias)
bias_df
```

```{r}
bias_df |>
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(origin, coverage_score), y = coverage_score)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#2B8CBE", alpha = 0.9) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "#D95F0E") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Coverage Score by Origin",
    x = "Origin",
    y = "coverage_score = user_count / population"
  ) +
  theme_plot_tufte()
```

## Render

```bash
quarto render vignettes/simulated-methods-walkthrough.qmd
```
